data.title: Bitcoin, Ethereum, Dogecoin Flat As Stocks Show Weakness For Second Straight Day: Analyst Anticipates Further Downsides Before A Liquidity Grab At This Level
data.description: Leading cryptocurrencies went sideways on Tuesday, aligning with the stock market’s subdued movements.

data.title: Trump Media, Mcdonald's, Starbucks, Philip Morris, And Tesla: Why These 5 Stocks Are On Investors' Radars Today
data.description: On Tuesday, U.S. markets closed with mixed results. The Dow Jones Industrial Average remained nearly unchanged at 42,924.89.

data.title: Trump Vows To 'Make Interest On Car Loans Fully Tax-Deductible' For Made In America Vehicles
data.description: Former President Donald Trump has proposed making the interest on car loans tax-deductible for vehicles manufactured in the United States. This move is seen as an attempt to bolster the American auto industry and attract voters.

data.title: Prepared If Trump Declares A Premature Victory, Says Kamala Harris: 'We Have The Resources And The Expertise'
data.description: Kamala Harris assured that her team is prepared to handle any premature victory claim by Donald Trump in an interview with NBC News on Tuesday Oct. 22, 2024.

data.title: Kamala Harris Face Potential Setback In Nevada's Early Voting: 'Firewall' Collapses In Clark County, Says Veteran Election Watcher
data.description: Early voting results from Nevada show Republicans leading for the first time since 2008, signaling potential challenges for Vice President Kamala Harris and the Democratic Party in the upcoming elections.
